opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have had a hard, heavy lump on my testicle for a few weeks, but tonight it suddenly felt like it exploded with pain and I cannot even touch it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on all of a sudden about two hours ago and it's unbearable — I need someone to help me tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: The lump I noticed a few weeks ago, but the severe pain started suddenly about two hours ago out of nowhere.
symptom_narrative.duration: The lump is about three weeks old; this awful pain has been going for roughly two hours.
symptom_narrative.character: It was a dull heavy ache and a firm lump before, and tonight it turned into a sharp, exploding pain.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: It's the worst pain I've ever had — I can't bear to touch it or move.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: In my left testicle and scrotum.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: It's been constant and intense since it hit tonight.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Lying very still with my hips bent up; honestly nothing really takes it away.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Any movement, standing, or the lightest touch.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: My chest / both breasts have felt a bit tender and swollen over the last month, which is weird. No burning when I wee, no discharge, and no fevers or chills.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: Never had anything like this before. I only first noticed the lump itself a few weeks ago and hoped it would go away.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand up straight or walk properly because of the pain.

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Young man, works and lives independently; put off getting the lump checked.

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch says my heart rate is about 110
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single wearable reading taken while in severe pain and distressed

objective_data_offered.value: he looks pale and sweaty on camera, lying on his side with his hips drawn up, clearly in a lot of pain
